meaning: adj.[电子](双稳态电路等)施密特的
examples: Kivell and Schmitt think this suggests the independent evolution of knuckle-walking behavior in the two African ape lineages.
My first appointment is with Mr. Schmitt.
We've arranged for a car to pick up Mr. Schmitt and his colleague at the airport.
Mr Schmitt's resignation could even help Mr Orban in his rows with Europe over media freedom.
Schmitt said she was thinking about the world record in the last 50 meters.
